title: Femme Fatality
description:
Helena is a rookie assassin who dreams of fame. Like you, she likes Nice Things. As she gets more kills, she gets more money to buy Nice Things. She also gets new skills

Find Targets, Read Fan-Mail, Delete Spam

After her first kill and the headlines it made on a lot of forums, Helena started getting requests for kills. Help her go through her inbox to determine which job is worth her time. 

Research Targets, Then Choose Your execution Methods

Not all targets are created equal. Some are worth the risk, others requires better stats to accomplish.  The stats you earn from buying nice things plus your performance in minigames will determine the success of the kills.

Buy Nice Things, Unlock Skills, Unlock Lore

This is a game about stats, getting your follower count high, and learning more about Helena.

Who is Helena?

Helena is a lone assassin who exclusively kills men. She is a refugee turned girl boss. This is an off-shoot prequel to Liminal Void detailing the life of Helena after her first kill up until the events of the first game.

This game doesn't endorse hate, btw.
description_short: You are a serial killer who exclusively targets men. For a fee. To afford nice things. It's legal and you're good at it.
